declaredLane: Serena shared proxy lookup rule capture
observedMutationClass: AGENTS entry reference and Codex coding guardrail lookup tool selection rule
acceptanceEvidenceClass: scoped docs lint and recurrence closeout sync; no gameplay, Unity runtime, or product acceptance evidence
rootCause: New sessions could load the Serena MCP registration but had no repo-owned rule for when to prefer Serena shared proxy over rg, when to avoid direct Serena registration, or how to degrade if Serena tools are unavailable.
prevention: AGENTS.md now links the Serena shared proxy reference, and ops.codex-coding-guardrails now records that simple text/file lookup uses rg while complex C# symbol/reference/impact lookup uses the Serena shared proxy MCP read-heavy tools. The same rule keeps Serena write/edit tools out of the default edit path and requires fallback to rg/file reads instead of unrequested proxy/config mutation when Serena is unavailable. This rule-only update does not change existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, or progress evidence overload.
verification: RULES_LINT_CHANGED_FILES=AGENTS.md + docs/owners/operations/codex_coding_guardrails.md npm run --silent rules:lint: docs lint passed, policy lint reached unrelated pre-existing LobbyUitkRuntimeAdapter responsibility-budget failure; RULES_LINT_CHANGED_FILES=AGENTS.md + docs/owners/operations/codex_coding_guardrails.md npm run --silent rules:sync-closeout synced this shard.
